status_thinking: The supervisor is analyzing the task...
capabilities_mcp_hint: All native Dome tools are available to every team member automatically. Choose which MCP servers this team can use.
members_hint: Select between 2 and {{max}} agents for the team. ({{count}}/{{max}})
no_agents: You have no agents yet. Create agents in the Agents section first.
supervisor_role_desc: The supervisor receives the user task and coordinates the team agents. Define how you want it to organize and distribute work.
default_supervisor_instructions:
You are the supervisor of this agent team. When the user gives you a task:
1. Analyze the request and decide which team agents are best suited.
2. Break the task into specific subtasks for each agent.
3. Delegate each subtask to the corresponding agent using the delegate_to_agent tool.
4. Once all agents have responded, synthesize the results into a coherent, well-structured answer.
5. Make sure agent responses complement each other and do not repeat unnecessarily.
Always respond in the user's language.
icon_hint: Choose an icon to represent this team
